Video.summary: The idea is simple: let the pre-existing parts of your project dictate the size of subsequent parts. And in many cases, this is much easier and far more accurate than measuring with a tape or ruler.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Relative Dimensioning

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Relative Dimensioning
The Wood Whisperer: Relative Dimensioning

Video.summary: This Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers is such a quick and cute craft that is perfect for the back to school season. Make your pencils stand out this year, or just brighten up your day by creating these tissue paper flowers. Everyone is going to love your DIY paper flowers and ask how you made your pencils. Whether you are decorating gel pencils or just regular #2 pencils, these die cut flowers are guaranteed to add a fun and pretty touch to your school supplies!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers
FaveCrafts: Adorable Flower Pencil Toppers

Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Mosaics

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Mosaics
The Crafty Chica: Mosaics

Video.summary: Sometimes it can really be a challenge finding the exact style you want from a headband. This Fleece Flower DIY Headband shows you how you can make the perfect floral headband just the way you want. This DIY headband project is the perfect flirty and girly headband that makes a great DIY gift too. If you have a friend that loves flowers, or are even contemplating what to get your flower girl in your wedding make them this handmade headband and they will be in love!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
